374.reason: Should not generate a token for lexical error 'a'. When an illegal symbol appears individually, only the error should be recorded; outputting a valid token type (AND/OR) for it is semantically incorrect.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  这里错误：既生成token又报错，但更关键的是之后会多执行一次fgetc（见最后），导致跳过字符
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  Should not generate a token for lexical error 'a'. When an illegal symbol appears individually, only the error should be recorded; outputting a valid token type (AND/OR) for it is semantically incorrect.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  Incorrectly emits a valid token for an invalid single '&'. Should only report an error and not add to the token stream.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: Should not generate a valid AND token for a single '&'; this incorrectly treats the illegal symbol as a valid token]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Individual '&' should not be treated as a valid AND token; it should only generate an error without adding a token]
